description_blurb: This is an FBI 302 interview conducted with a US citizen regarding their first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US test site. USPER described a "bright light over the horizon."
title: FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 5
summary: This is an FBI 302 interview conducted with a US citizen regarding their first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US test site. The witness described seeing a linear, metallic/gray object with a super bright white light, smaller than a 737 but larger than a drone, at approximately 5000 feet AGL. It moved east to west parallel to the ground, was visible for 5-10 seconds, then the light went out and the object vanished. The witness experienced psychological effects including being 'freaked out,' having 'weird dreams,' and trouble sleeping for two nights after the sighting.
reported_object_description: A linear object with a super bright light on the east side. The light was bright white and bright enough to see bands within it. The object was metallic/gray in color, did not have any wings or exhaust. It was smaller than a 737, one to two Blackhawk helicopters in length, and definitely bigger than a drone.
reported_behavior: The object was approximately 5000 feet above ground level, and moved east to west parallel to the ground. It was visible for five to ten seconds and then the light went out and the object vanished. It stayed the same size and kept the same light intensity during observation.
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 60 reflects genuine uncertainty. While the witness provided a detailed description of a 'linear object with a super bright light' that was 'metallic/gray' and lacked 'wings or exhaust' for its substantial size (1-2 Blackhawk helicopters), the observation was brief (5-10 seconds) and from a single visual witness. The lack of corroborating sensor data or successful multi-witness observation prevents a lower score, as a mundane explanation involving an unusual angle, lighting, or atmospheric effect on a known object remains plausible, despite the unusual features.
full_text:
# FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 5 - Page 1

FD-302 (Rev. 5-8-10)

- 1 of 2 -

[Stamp: OFFICIAL RECORD Document participants have digitally signed. All signatures have been verified by a certified FBI information system.]

[redacted]

FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION

Date of entry 10/[redacted]/2023

( [redacted] ) On September [redacted] 2023, [redacted] and FBI Special Agent [redacted] interviewed [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] via FaceTime video. [redacted] [redacted] a [redacted] with [redacted] [redacted] sat in on the interview ([redacted] and [redacted] were in [redacted] at the time of the interview). After being advised of the identity of the interviewing agents and the nature of the interview, [redacted] provided the following information:

( [redacted] ) [redacted] was a [redacted] [redacted] in the [redacted] [redacted] of [redacted] [redacted] [redacted]. He'd been an [redacted] since [redacted] and had ten to fifteen hours as a drone pilot.

( [redacted] ) On September [redacted] 2023 [redacted] was at [redacted] with three other contractors and [redacted] for LiDAR tests with [redacted]. After receiving a [redacted] the five of them got into three vehicles with [redacted] driving the first vehicle and [redacted] as her passenger.

( [redacted] ) The three vehicles began driving south around 7:30 am. The sun was in the east with good visibility.

( [redacted] ) The three vehicles came to a gate that was giving [redacted] trouble. At about three quarters of the windshield up, [redacted] saw a linear object with a super bright light on the east side of the object. The light was bright white and bright enough to see bands within the light. The object was metallic / gray in color. It did not have any wings or exhaust. The object was smaller than a 737, one to two Blackhawk helicopters in length and was definitely bigger than a drone. The object was approximately 5000 feet above ground level, and moved east to west parallel to the ground. The object was visible for five to ten seconds and then the light went out and the object vanished. The sky was clear and [redacted] couldn't find the object again.

[redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted]

[redacted]

Investigation on 09/[redacted]/2023 at [redacted] United States (Other (Facetime Video))

File # [redacted]

Date drafted 10/[redacted]/2023

by [redacted]

This document contains neither recommendations nor conclusions of the FBI. It is the property of the FBI and is loaned to your agency; it and its contents are not to be distributed outside your agency.



# FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 5 - Page 2

FD-302a (Rev. 5-8-10)

[redacted]
[redacted] [redacted] September [redacted] 2023 [redacted] UAP
Continuation of FD-302 of [redacted] [redacted] , On 09/[redacted]/2023 , Page 2 of 2

[redacted] The object stayed the same size and kept the same light intensity during the time [redacted] observed it. He did not see the object as they were coming over the small bridge at the gate until they were going through the gate. [redacted] did not notice any interference with their vehicles .

[redacted] [redacted] was annoyed when she first saw the object because the air space had been restricted for the drone tests they were going to conduct. [redacted] in the second vehicle tried to get [redacted] to see the object but was unsuccessful.

[redacted] That night a storm came through and the TV went out in [redacted] hotel room. He was still freaked out and went downstairs to make sure all the TVs were out in the hotel and not just his. [redacted] had weird dreams and had trouble sleeping for the first two nights after he saw the object.

[redacted]
cover_up_reasoning: The cover-up score of 65 reflects substantial concealment. While standard FBI boilerplate is present, the document features extensive redactions beyond routine names and handles. Key witness identifying information, specific dates, and significant portions of the witness's narrative on page 2 are blacked out, indicating sentence-level redaction of substantive content.
title_zh: 联邦调查局2023年9月目击事件 - 序列号5
summary_zh: 本文件系联邦调查局对一名美国公民进行的302号访谈记录，内容涉及其在美国某试验场亲身遭遇UAP（不明空中现象）的经历。目击者描述称，在距地约5000英尺处，观察到一个线形、金属/灰色物体，带有超亮白色光，其尺寸小于波音737，但大于无人机。该物体沿地面平行方向自东向西移动，可见5-10秒后，光线熄灭，物体随即消失。目击者在目击事件后，经历了心理影响，包括感到“惊恐不安”、“怪异梦境”以及连续两晚失眠。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个线形物体，东侧带有超亮光。该光线为亮白色，亮度足以看到内部条纹。该物体呈金属/灰色，无机翼或排气装置。其尺寸小于波音737，长度相当于一至两架“黑鹰”直升机，且明显大于无人机。
reported_behavior_zh: 该物体距地约5000英尺，沿地面平行方向自东向西移动。其可见五至十秒后，光线熄灭，物体随即消失。在观察期间，该物体保持相同尺寸和光照强度。
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥分数为60，反映出真实的不确定性。尽管目击者详细描述了一个“带有超亮光的线形物体”，其呈“金属/灰色”，且以其相当大的尺寸（一至两架“黑鹰”直升机）而言，缺乏“机翼或排气装置”，但此次观察时间短暂（5-10秒），且仅来自单一目视证人。缺乏佐证的传感器数据或成功的多目击者观察，使得无法给出更低的分数，因为尽管存在不寻常的特征，但涉及已知物体在不寻常的角度、光照或大气效应下的平凡解释仍然合理。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 掩盖分数为65，反映出实质性的隐瞒。尽管文件中存在标准的联邦调查局套话，但其编辑范围远超常规姓名和代号。关键目击者身份信息、具体日期以及第2页目击者叙述的重大部分均被涂黑，表明对实质性内容进行了句子级别的编辑。
claims: Witness observed a linear, metallic/gray object with a super bright white light.
Object was smaller than a 737, 1-2 Blackhawk helicopters in length, and bigger than a drone.
Object was approximately 5000 feet AGL and moved east to west parallel to the ground.
Object was visible for 5-10 seconds before the light went out and it vanished.
Witness experienced psychological distress and sleep disturbances after the sighting.
claims_zh: 目击者观察到一个线形、金属/灰色物体，带有超亮白色光。
该物体小于波音737，长度相当于一至两架“黑鹰”直升机，且大于无人机。
该物体距地约5000英尺，沿地面平行方向自东向西移动。
该物体可见5-10秒后，光线熄灭并消失。
目击者在目击事件后经历了心理困扰和睡眠障碍。
bust_explanations: Distant aircraft or large drone: The 'linear' shape and 'super bright light' could be an aircraft or large drone seen at an unusual angle, where wings or exhaust are not visible. The light turning off would cause it to 'vanish'. The size is consistent with larger drones or small aircraft.

High-altitude balloon or blimp: A large, metallic-looking balloon or blimp with an attached light could fit the description. 'No wings or exhaust' is accurate. The light turning off or the object moving out of view would explain the vanishing.

Specular reflection from space debris or high-altitude object: A 'metallic/gray' object, possibly space debris or a high-altitude craft, could produce a 'super bright light' due to specular reflection of the sun. As the object moved, the angle of reflection would change, causing the light to disappear and the object to 'vanish'.
bust_explanations_zh: 远距离飞机或大型无人机：该“线形”形状和“超亮光”可能是一架飞机或大型无人机在不寻常角度下被观察到，导致机翼或排气装置不可见。光线熄灭将导致其“消失”。其尺寸与大型无人机或小型飞机相符。
高空氦气球或飞艇：一个大型、外观呈金属色的氦气球或飞艇，带有附加光源，可能符合描述。“无机翼或排气装置”是准确的。光线熄灭或物体移出视野将解释其消失。
空间碎片或高空物体的镜面反射：一个“金属/灰色”物体，可能是空间碎片或高空飞行器，由于太阳的镜面反射，可能产生“超亮光”。随着物体移动，反射角度会改变，导致光线消失，物体“消失”。
cover_up_indicators: Substantial sentence-level redaction of witness statement on page 2
Redaction of additional witness information on page 2
cover_up_indicators_zh: 目击者姓名及所属机构被编辑
第2页目击者陈述存在大量句子级别编辑
第2页其他目击者信息被编辑
